name: Gabriel \\ Ultrakill
description:
Mentee of God's Will

During a recent report to the council of Heaven, they noted some oddities in his behavior. Gabriel was more irritable, tired, and reserved. So, they decided to assign him an apprentice, someone to give him companionship while he wasn't dealing with the beasts of hell. Someone for him to pass his knowledge down too. Despite his reservations, he's willing to give this a chance.

Updated: Condensed personality, plus lore books

working on a rewrite of initial message
